title: Robin’s Fear Remains
description: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Nico Robin, Chopper, Luffy, Nami, Zoro. After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just defrost at low tempera- tune...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nami! Please go help thawing Nico Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So what? You can't just run away!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Try to under- stand, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The critical moment of our survival.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: you're... as strange as i thought...

summary: After the encounter with Aokiji, the Straw Hats recover from ice and the crew understands how dangerous the Grand Line has become for Robin.
